codeReview.summary: Pass. The prior blocking issue is resolved at current HEAD. LocalDir staging now rejects symlinked ancestors via `snapshot_local_dir_source()`/`ensure_no_symlinked_ancestors()` (`crates/agents-core/src/sandbox/mod.rs:787-896`), stages copies into a temporary directory with cleanup on failure (`crates/agents-core/src/sandbox/mod.rs:726-750`), and revalidates both each copied entry and the original root snapshot after copy steps (`crates/agents-core/src/sandbox/mod.rs:752-873`). The regression suite now explicitly covers symlinked-ancestor rejection, deterministic live source swaps, and workspace-root path confinement (`crates/openai-agents/tests/sandbox_semantics.rs:381-630`), which brings the feature in line with VAL-SANDBOX-004 and VAL-SANDBOX-005.

summary: Reviewed the prior failed review, feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, `rust-sandbox-worker`, mission guidance, commit `48be1b085fef8b721697a88e60c5aa7821c2d1c5`, and current HEAD `7f9e16905d2b5031a5606c7d3668be8534337b93`. Status: pass. The previous blocking LocalDir safety issue is resolved at current HEAD: symlinked ancestors and live source swaps are now rejected with cleanup, and the sandbox workspace path guards for file and patch operations remain intact.
